description_long: This object is a stylized, cartoon-like ham steak with a large bone running through its center, presented on a round, dark plate. The ham is depicted with a crosshatched pattern on its outer surface, suggesting a glazed or roasted finish. One thick slice has been cut from the main ham, revealing a pinkish-red interior with lighter marbling and a central bone. The plate is garnished with several green leaves, adding a decorative touch. The bone is exaggerated in size and appears smooth and white, contrasting with the textured, orange-brown exterior of the meat. The overall presentation is playful and visually appealing, suitable for a festive or urban food setting.
description: A stylized ham steak with a large bone, crosshatched surface, and a cut slice, served on a plate with green leaf garnish.
description_view_0: The ham is shown with its cut face and bone visible, accompanied by a thick slice and green leaves on a plate.
description_view_1: The view highlights the uncut end of the ham, the bone protruding outward, and more of the green garnish around the plate.
description_view_2: The ham is seen from the side, emphasizing the cylindrical shape, crosshatched surface, and the bone extending from both ends.
description_view_3: The cut face and slice are prominent, with the marbling and central bone clearly visible, along with the garnish and plate.
attribute_grill_marks: There are no visible grill marks on the steak; the surface is crosshatched but not charred.
attribute_garnish_or_plating_style: The steak is plated on a dark dish with several green leaves as garnish.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: There is moderate, evenly distributed fat marbling visible within the cut face of the steak.
